name: GitBook
description: Drive GitBook (docs platform) from any AI agent: spaces, pages, content, search, collections. 9 tools, Bearer auth.
instructions:
This connector uses the GitBook API v1 (developer.gitbook.com).

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to https://app.gitbook.com → bottom-left avatar → **Settings → Developer → Personal access tokens → Create new token**.
2. Copy the token. Set `GITBOOK_API_TOKEN`.

**Authentication**: `Authorization: Bearer ${GITBOOK_API_TOKEN}`.

**Hierarchy**: Organization → Collection → Space → Page (a tree of pages, sub-pages, content).

**Space IDs**: each space has a UUID-like ID. Discover via `gitbook_list_spaces`.

**Pages**: content lives in pages. Each page has id, slug, title, type (document, group, link), revision_id (every change creates a new revision).

**Content format**: GitBook stores content as a JSON document tree (their own AST). Reading is straightforward; writing requires constructing the AST — out of scope for most agent use. For simple writes, use 'GitBook content imports' (markdown imports) — exposed as `gitbook_import_markdown_to_page`.

**Search**: full-text across spaces.

**Pagination**: `?page=N&limit=M` (max 100).

**Out of scope here**: content editing via the AST, change requests, revisions diff, custom domains, integrations management.

tools.name: gitbook_get_me
tools.description: Return the user the token belongs to: id, displayName, email, photoURL.

tools.name: gitbook_list_organizations
tools.description: List organizations the user is a member of.

tools.name: gitbook_list_spaces
tools.description: List spaces in an organization. Each space has id, title, visibility (public/private), urls.

tools.name: gitbook_get_space
tools.description: Fetch a single space with full metadata.

tools.name: gitbook_get_space_content
tools.description: Get the table of contents / page tree for a space (latest revision).

tools.name: gitbook_get_page
tools.description: Fetch a page's content (the JSON AST). Use format=document (default) or format=markdown for source.

tools.name: gitbook_search_content
tools.description: Full-text search across spaces. Returns pages with snippets.

tools.name: gitbook_import_markdown_to_page
tools.description: Import Markdown content into a page (replaces the page's content). The agent can write a page in plain Markdown and push it.
